steps.title: Identify the direct outcome when oil was added
steps.content: The passage explicitly states: “when the researchers added a drop of oil as lubrication, that friction nearly vanished.” This is the key fact that directly answers the question.

steps.title: Connect the outcome to the right choice
steps.content:
B — “The low amount of friction between the surfaces became even lower” — directly captures what “nearly vanished” means: friction that was already extremely low went even lower.

The other choices describe the setup stages or contradict the stated outcome.

That confirms B is correct.
